items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2025 New Men's ANDIAMO Shoulder Bag. The undisputed star of Bottega Veneta is the Andiamo. The first new favorite of 2025 is this exclusive men's bag with a unique buckle. The designer has clearly incorporated many clever details. The detachable shoulder strap is very convenient for office elites to carry work logs and office supplies, reducing the burden in their hands. The interior features two large compartments and one small zippered compartment. Unlike the women's version, the compartments here are not detachable. The fixed large single layer makes it easy to go out for work lightly and avoid piling up too many small items.

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 New Arrival Women's ANDIAMO Handbag with Ramie Wool Toggle [Jump][Jump]. How can a classic style be without a new look? As a heavyweight guest of the Pilot series, the Andiamo abandons its previous elegant and restrained style, entering the winter track with a modern urban vibe. It is chic and retro, perfect for simple outfits in autumn and winter to show a premium feel. Young women can easily carry it, and the interior continues the classic Andiamo design, making it super versatile.

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2024 New Arrival Women's Mini WALLACE Bag. BV interprets classic bag shapes with special materials every season. The bento bag has been very popular in new arrivals in recent years. The new winter release features lambskin and ramie wool combined, making it a warm and cute winter accessory. Carrying a small bag is convenient and beautiful when wearing thicker clothes.

items.name_en: A highly anticipated BV Bottega Veneta lunch box bag🔥. The entire body is crafted from top-tier nappa lambskin, very soft and lightweight. It also features the intrecciato weaving technique, developed by the two founders over several months since the brand's inception. Completely hand-woven by Italian artisans, perfectly embodying Bottega's artisanal spirit. The bag shape is practical and popular, and the slightly curved opening fits the wrist better. Model: 754443. Dimensions: 22*13*9
